spotify.castHint: Open Spotify on your phone and play to “{device}”
spotify.controlHint: Playing on {device} · control from your phone
spotify.deviceNameHint: The name this box shows in your phone's Spotify Connect list. Give each box a distinct name.
spotify.followedHint: Only the owner can browse this playlist's tracks — use Play all.
spotify.boxNotFound: The box isn't on a linked Spotify account right now. Link your account under Accounts (or cast to it once from your phone).
spotify.starting: Starting playback… (signing the box in may take a few seconds)
spotify.enableHint: Make this box a Spotify Connect target so you can cast music to it from your phone. No account needed — enabling it starts the Connect service on this box.
spotify.connectToggleHint: Off = the box isn't discoverable for casting and the Connect service doesn't run.
spotify.adoptFailed: Couldn't sign the box into your account. Cast to it once from your phone — after that it'll work from here.
spotify.inUse: Someone is casting to the box right now — stop that playback first.
spotify.keysWhere: Free, one-time setup — we'll walk you through it.
spotify.guideIntro: Optional — only needed to browse Liked Songs, playlists and search. Casting works without it.
spotify.guideStep1: On your phone or computer, open the Spotify developer dashboard and create an app (any name).
spotify.guideStep2: In the app's settings, add this Redirect URI exactly:
spotify.guideStep3: Copy the app's Client ID and Client Secret.
spotify.guideStep4: Continue — a QR opens a form on your phone to paste both keys.
spotify.keysHint: Scan with your phone and paste the Client ID and Secret from your Spotify app.
spotify.connectScan: Scan with your phone — the login opens automatically. Then fill the Email / Code fields there.
spotify.connectSteps: On your phone: enter your email → Send, then the code you get by email (or your password) → Send.
spotify.notRegistered: Spotify rejected this account: it is not added to your developer app. On developer.spotify.com open your app, Settings, User Management, and add the account's email.
